[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "stressful game. has its good and bad moments. really have to be in the mood though or its just annoying."}]},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "this game is a addiction it ruins ur sleep"}]},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "impossible to put down — I've sunk hundreds of hours"},
    {"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "still find myself coming back"},
    {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The gameplay itself is genuinely brilliant"},
    {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the ceiling on skill is basically infinite"},
    {"aspect": "developer_conduct", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "hard to ignore what Epic did to this game — removing trading, gutting the progression system"},
    {"aspect": "monetization", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "turning what used to be a thriving community into a cash-grab storefront"},
    {"aspect": "community", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The toxicity in lobbies is real too"},
    {"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the core game is still one of the best ever made"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "endless joy that puts this game in my top five"}]},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 10, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Addiction is this game. I have never been the same."}]},
  {"idx": 11, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "mods", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "having all kinds of mods on this game makes it ten times better"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 12, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "crashing, freezing that continued AFTER I seemingly closed the game"},
    {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "horrible lag"},
    {"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "constant pop up errors"},
    {"aspect": "mods", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the game outright REFUSING to load maps or turn on/off mods"},
    {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "$32 of cash down the drain"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 15, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you can play the game multiple different ways (Merc, Trader, Vassel, Ruler)"},
    {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The world, for the most part, moves pretty consistantly and things constantly change"},
    {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Battles can be fun and do require some thinking"},
    {"aspect": "level_design", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "Seiges are a great feature, you just lack the ability to control them well"},
    {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Dialouges are rough and uninteresting, every NPC interaction is identical and repetitive"},
    {"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "AI lords and leaders are terrible when it comes to tactics"},
    {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Graphics are very poor"},
    {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "There is so much potential in the towns and villages if they were more interactive"},
    {"aspect": "level_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Hideouts are bland and monotonous"},
    {"aspect": "mods", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you will absolutely need mods as the base systems and features just arent there"},
    {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "Buy on discount"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 16, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 17, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "fun and addicting"}]},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 19, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 20, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 21, "aspects": [{"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the art in the game is fire!"}]},
  {"idx": 22, "aspects": [{"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Great fun with much replayability."}]},
  {"idx": 23, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "general dungeon crawler type of gameplay"}, {"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "anime girl squad with kinda unappropriate visual fighting a cosmic horror"}]},
  {"idx": 24, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 25, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 26, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 27, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 28, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 29, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 30, "aspects": [{"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "fun but a little hard not that hard thought unless you have a skill issue"}]},
  {"idx": 31, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Fun! And Rage-Inducing! But mostly fun!"}]},
  {"idx": 32, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "even when its already challenging in normal mode,expert makes it impeccably harder"},
    {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "a game that actually requires time effort and practice to master the mechanics"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 33, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 34, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "good fun game!"}]},
  {"idx": 35, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "procedurally generated planets (including weather, terrain, etc.), animals, plants, encounters, etc. It even has base building, freighters and expeditions, and settlement management"},
    {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "a mile wide and an inch deep"},
    {"aspect": "pacing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "From the moment you leave the starting planet, the game is an exercise in tedium and repetition"},
    {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "I never felt a sense of danger"},
    {"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The multiplayer aspects of this game are totally unnecessary"},
    {"aspect": "ui", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the UI is genuinely one of the worst user interfaces I've ever used in a game"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 36, "aspects": [{"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Infinite loading screen on vr... waited for 30 minutes"}]},
  {"idx": 37, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "my main save has over 250hrs not including expeditions"},
    {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "this game is worth every dollar"},
    {"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "for 10 years they been tossing out free updates"},
    {"aspect": "developer_conduct", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "10/10 game and devs"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 38, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Its fun now after all the updates. It was really bad on launch."},
    {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Lots of stuff to do now so its quite fun"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 39, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "will still take 5 hours from my day in the blink of an eye"}]},
  {"idx": 40, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 41, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 42, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 43, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 44, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 45, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "the first boss was pretty rough. But after getting good a bit, it's pretty good"},
    {"aspect": "dlc", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I especially appreciated the Ring City DLC, which is some of the hardest Fromsoft content"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 46, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "this game is very bloodborne-like and i honestly see no difference between the two and i enjoy every minute of it"}]},
  {"idx": 47, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 48, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 49, "aspects": []}
]

  {"idx": 23, "aspects": [{"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "from the characters"}, {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "to the tasks"}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "to the visuals you get"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "this game is always expanding"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "more character development (Wizard, Dwarf, Krobus, etc.)"}, {"aspect": "save without waiting", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "being able to save without waiting for the end of the day"}, {"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "such a wonderful way to unwind after a long day"}]},
  {"idx": 24, "aspects": [{"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Super cute"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "fun farming game"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "It has a lot of different elements for everyone to enjoy"}]},
  {"idx": 25, "aspects": [{"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "bought the game with 75% discount, which I think is a price worth the experience"}, {"aspect": "atmosphere", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Very nice atmosphere"}, {"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "and music"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "The story is okay"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "touches an important area of our existence, which is death"}]},
  {"idx": 26, "aspects": [{"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "This game is beautiful"}, {"aspect": "OSHA violations", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the only curse on this family is all of the OSHA violations"}]},
  {"idx": 27, "aspects": [{"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "couldn't go through any of the story without brawling out"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The narratives are so so SO gorgeous"}, {"aspect": "pacing", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you have to give it some time to sink in"}]},
  {"idx": 28, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the story is great"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "each of the characters' story made the most of their time"}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "short but (bitter)sweet"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "a great purchase this 2025 winter sale"}]},
  {"idx": 29, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Solid storytelling"}, {"aspect": "atmosphere", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "some really good atmosphere"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "There isn't much gameplay per se"}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "A super short game too (2-2.5 hours max)"}, {"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "There were a few glitches with Molly and Calvin's stories"}]},
  {"idx": 30, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Fun and time consuming"}, {"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Better with friends"}]},

  {"idx": 17, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "a simple game, but very fun"}, {"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The colored graphics, like a Commodore 64 game, is nice"}, {"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The soundtrack is spectacular"}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "In the main game itself is not large"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "it will spend a few more hours if you are hunting achievements"}, {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "they are almost impossible"}, {"aspect": "controls", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The controller compatibility works very well"}]},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": [{"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Very deceptively challenging"}, {"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "1980's style and charm"}, {"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "REALLY good sound-track"}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "fretter a few hours with"}]},
  {"idx": 19, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 20, "aspects": [{"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "very Glitchy after completing the Quest unwonted guest! the key to free the refugee hostages failed to appear"}, {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "an NPC, by the name mom'a refused dialog before I even got the quest"}, {"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the enemies respond when I returned"}]},
  {"idx": 21, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Fun game, very much a sequel to Wasteland 2"}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Visually quite good"}, {"aspect": "voice_acting", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Almost all dialogue has quality voice over"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "some of the characters in the game are quite wild"}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The game is a bit short, without the DLCs you've got about 30 hours"}, {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "On higher difficulty settings, if you don't properly plan out your character level ups, you can end up with a real hard end game"}, {"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "there are some cookie cutter OP builds"}, {"aspect": "balance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Most of the difficulty comes from sheer chance on your to hit and resist rolls"}, {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "besides using cover, there is very little actual strategy in combat"}, {"aspect": "dlc", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Steeltown DLC adds some crappy new stacking status effects"}, {"aspect": "dlc", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Cult of the holy detonation DLC seems to be a bit lacking in stuff to do"}]},
  {"idx": 22, "aspects": [{"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The combat and squad building/RPG elements are quite fun"}, {"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "squad building/RPG elements are quite fun"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "as is the overall gameplay"}, {"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Music and sound are top notch"}, {"aspect": "sound_design", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Music and sound are top notch"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Some of the characters in the game are quite wild"}, {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "most quests and places you come across are pretty interesting"}, {"aspect": "exploration", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "most quests and places you come across are pretty interesting"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The story is good"}, {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the writing is very poor"}, {"aspect": "player_choice", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "results of some dialogue choices make no logical sense, and apparently there's never any way to change any outcome"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Kinda wish there was more content and quests with existing factions/cities"}]},
